local_state_space.description: Local doubled address space arising from 4 adjacency directions and a binary sheet parity in the signed 2-cover.

swap_operator.definition: Sheet exchange operator acting on the doubled local basis.

swap_mode.interpretation: Uniform sheet-flip direction representing pure swap transport.

derived_structure.interpretation: The 8-dimensional doubled local state space contains a distinguished 1-dimensional swap mode corresponding to sheet exchange. Its orthogonal complement is therefore 7-dimensional and represents the effective preserve-transport state space.
